tagline.zh: 颅内出血 CT 智能分诊

description.zh: 分析非增强头颅 CT，自动检测疑似颅内出血(ICH)并在工作列表中提示优先级，辅助分诊。
description.en: Analyzes non-contrast head CT to detect suspected intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) and flag worklist prioritization for triage.

fda.productCodeName: Radiological Computer-Assisted Triage and Notification Software
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 肋骨骨折 CT 智能优先级

description.zh: 检测胸部 CT 上的肋骨骨折并标注优先级，辅助阅片排序。
description.en: Detects rib fractures on chest CT and assigns prioritization to assist reading order.

fda.productCodeName: Radiological Computer-Aided Prioritization Software for Lesions
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

description.zh: 自动化放射影像处理与 AI 应用承载平台。
description.en: Automated radiological image processing and an AI application hosting platform.

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: CT 影像 AI 后处理

description.zh: CT 影像的 AI 后处理与高级可视化软件。
description.en: AI post-processing and advanced visualization software for CT.

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: MR 影像 AI 后处理

description.zh: MR 影像的 AI 后处理与高级可视化软件（另见 K253077）。
description.en: AI post-processing and advanced visualization software for MR (see also K253077).

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: PET 深度学习降噪重建

description.zh: 用预训练神经网络降低 FDG-PET 图像噪声、提升信噪比（随影像系统获批）。
description.en: Uses a pretrained neural network to reduce FDG-PET noise and improve SNR (cleared within the imaging system).

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

description.zh: CT 图像的深度学习重建，提升图像质量（随影像系统获批）。
description.en: Deep-learning reconstruction for CT that improves image quality (cleared within the imaging system).

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: MR 深度学习加速重建

description.zh: MR 的深度学习加速与重建（随影像系统获批）。
description.en: Deep-learning acceleration and reconstruction for MR (cleared within the imaging system).

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

description.zh: 深度学习重建技术，提升图像质量（随影像系统获批）。
description.en: Deep-learning reconstruction that improves image quality (cleared within the imaging system).

fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.

tagline.zh: 摄像头无接触心率/呼吸率（演示）

description.zh: 用摄像头无接触采集约 12 秒视频，返回心率与呼吸率。研究/演示用，非医疗器械。
description.en: Contactless ~12s webcam capture returning heart rate and respiratory rate. Research/demo only, not a medical device.
